retrieved_result: Looking for a deal? Oklahoma shoppers preparing for tax-free weekend OKLAHOMA CITY – With many kids going back to school, parents are trying to find ways to save money. This weekend, Oklahoma families can head to the stores for the state’s annual sales tax holiday. Officials say qualified items will be sold without a sales tax beginning at 12:01 a.m. on Friday, Aug.

history.title: Looking for a deal? Oklahoma shoppers preparing for tax-free weekend
history.description: OKLAHOMA CITY – With many kids going back to school, parents are trying to find ways to save money. This weekend, Oklahoma families can head to the stores for the state’s annual sales tax holiday. Officials say qualified items will be sold without a sales tax beginning at 12:01 a.m. on Friday, Aug.
